name: UBA : User Access from Unusual Locations
notes: Indicates that users were successfully able to authenticate in countries that are unusual for your network, as defined by the building block rule "UBA : BB : Unusual Source Locations".
conditions_text: when an event matches all of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters, BB:UBA : Excluded Geographic Locations, BB:UBA : Unusual Source Locations
TD_list: APPLY UBA : User Access from Unusual Locations on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches all of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters, BB:UBA : Excluded Geographic Locations, BB:UBA : Unusual Source Locations
RED_list: Event name: UBA : User Access from Unusual Locations
Event description: senseValue=15,senseDesc='The user successfully authenticated from countries that are unusual for your network.',usecase_id='ae5e3db1-a8fa-4e01-8bde-2619fd49cef8'
